title: JSON Array Generator
scenario: Create a JSON array with 5 objects, each containing a unique name and a random age between 18 and 65. The JSON array should be properly formatted and easy to read.
constraints: Must be a JSON array with 5 objects
Each object must have a "name" and "age" property
Age values must be between 18 and 65

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the JSON array has exactly 5 objects.
Check if each object meets the constraints (name and age).
Evaluate if the JSON array is easy to read due to proper indentation and formatting.
